title: cyperus × jouannetii
intro: Cyperus × jouannetii, also known as the umbrella sedge or umbrella papyrus, is a hybrid plant species within the sedge family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyperus × jouannetii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe irritated skin. The plant can be used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or applied topically to the affected area.
